title: PT. Mandirijaya Multi Perkasa
description: Official company profile website for PT. MANDIRIJAYA MULTI PERKASA, a contractor specializing in aluminium, glass, and general construction services. Features public pages, admin dashboard with Supabase auth, and responsive design.

title: Obesity Level Prediction
description: A machine learning application that predicts obesity levels based on health indicators and lifestyle factors using Scikit-learn models.

title: Cats vs Dogs Classification
description: A deep learning image classifier using CNNs to distinguish between cat and dog photos, deployed as an interactive Streamlit web app.

title: NLP Text Analysis App
description: A natural language processing tool for sentiment analysis, text classification, and keyword extraction built with Python and Streamlit.
